_comment: Synthetic LongMemEval-style fixture for experiments/memory_recall_bench.js. NOT a real benchmark — it exists so the harness is runnable + CI-testable offline and so the IDF mode's advantage over flat keyword matching is demonstrable. Instance q1 is adversarial: the gold session matches only the RARE query term (arrhythmia) while 6 distractors each match two COMMON query terms (cardiologist+medication), so flat keyword ranking pushes gold out of top-5 but IDF ranking pulls it to #1. Drop a real data/longmemeval/longmemeval_s.json beside this file for a publishable number.

instances.question: What did the cardiologist say about my arrhythmia medication?

turns.content: After the ECG, Dr. Lee adjusted my arrhythmia plan and said it looks stable now.
My cardiologist switched my medication brand last week.
I asked the cardiologist about medication side effects.
The cardiologist office called about my medication refill.
Cardiologist appointment to review medication dosage timing.
A new cardiologist wants a medication adjustment next month.
Insurance denied the cardiologist prescribed medication.

instances.question: What breed is my neighbor's dog?

turns.content: My neighbor's dog is a border collie breed, super energetic.
I walked my own dog this morning before work.
The neighbor borrowed a ladder over the weekend.
We planted tomatoes in the garden yesterday.
The coffee machine at the office broke again.
I booked a flight to Denver for the conference.
My phone battery has been draining fast lately.

instances.question: Where did I park the motorcycle downtown?

turns.content: I park the motorcycle in the downtown garage on 5th Street.
The downtown traffic was terrible during rush hour.
I bought a new helmet for the motorcycle.
We had lunch at a downtown cafe near the river.
My car insurance renewal is due in March.
The library extended its weekend hours.
I finished reading a novel about sailing.
